phrases.intent_en: Where is the street food section
phrases.cultural_note: The market is linear, so using other stalls as landmarks is a natural way to give directions.

likely_response.local: Uprostřed tržnice, hned za stánky s ovocem.
likely_response.translation_en: In the middle of the market, right behind the fruit stalls.

responses.english: In the middle of the market, right behind the fruit stalls.
responses.french: Uprostřed tržnice, hned za stánky s ovocem.

phrases.intent_en: Can I sample the fruit before buying
phrases.cultural_note: It's common for vendors to offer a sample, especially at fruit and produce stands.

phrases.intent_en: Is haggling expected at produce stands
phrases.cultural_note: Haggling is not typical at Prague's permanent city markets, unlike some touristy souvenir spots.
Many smaller market stalls are cash-only, so it's good to have coins and small bills ready.

likely_response.local: Většinou jen ty s občerstvením, jinak hotovost.
likely_response.translation_en: Mostly only the refreshment ones, otherwise cash.

responses.english: Mostly only the refreshment ones, otherwise cash.
responses.french: Většinou jen ty s občerstvením, jinak hotovost.
